root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate,'DD/MM/YYYY') as sysdate_tdate, ( case loan_group_code when '01' then 'ฉุกเฉิน' when '02' then 'สามัญ' else 'พิเศษ' end ) as group_code_name
,( select count(sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_membership_registered where (sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) and (sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock <> 0) and (sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no < '70000') and (member_status_code = '0') ) as count_mem_share_normal
,(select sum(sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock) from sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_membership_registered Where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0') and (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type != '02' )) as sumshare_mem_code_0
,(select sum(sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock) from sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_membership_registered where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '02') ) as sumshare_mem_code_1
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_lon_m_contract WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no not in ( '9650' , '9988' ) ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code <> '3' ) ) and (sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type in ('ฉฉ','ฉช','ฉภ','ฉม','ฉอ','50','60','ก2','ก3','ส0','ส1','ส2','ส3','ส4','ส5','ส7','พ1','พ2','พ3','พง','ปน','สค')) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type
